learned_topics: Qualitative and Quantitative Analysis of User Discontinuance
Investigating Early Discontinuance in Value-Congruent Generative AI Systems
avoided_topics: Generative UI Personalization with Social Capital Integration

recommendation_defaults.expected_output: Ideas that can become a real paper using public datasets.

papers.title: Social capital-aware graph neural networks for recommender systems
papers.abstract: We integrate social capital signals from user social networks into GNN-based collaborative filtering and profile modeling for recommendation.

papers.title: Trust and social influence in profile-based recommender systems
papers.abstract: This paper studies how social network structure and user profile modeling affect recommendation quality in social recommender systems.

papers.title: Modeling user profiles with heterogeneous social relations for recommendation
papers.abstract: We propose profile modeling that combines social capital metrics and network embeddings for personalized recommendation.

papers.title: Social capital in rural communities: a sociological survey
papers.abstract: A qualitative study of community networks in agriculture without computational recommendation methods.

papers.title: Graph neural networks for collaborative filtering
papers.abstract: Survey of GNN recommenders without explicit social capital modeling.

good_proposal.title: Social capital signals for profile-aware GNN recommenders
good_proposal.research_gap: Existing GNN recommenders underuse explicit social capital constructs in profile modeling.
good_proposal.research_question: How do social capital metrics improve profile-aware recommendation under sparse networks?
good_proposal.hypothesis: Injecting social capital features into profile encoders improves NDCG on public social recommendation datasets.
good_proposal.proposed_method: Profile modeling layer over social network embeddings with ablations on capital dimensions.
good_proposal.novelty_delta: Joint profile modeling of social capital and GNN message passing for recommender systems.
good_proposal.expected_contribution: Benchmarked framework linking social capital theory to recommender profile modeling.
